name: list_files
description: List files in a Backblaze B2 bucket. You can filter by name prefix (to simulate folder browsing) and paginate through large result sets using startFileName and maxFileCount.

parameters.name: bucketId
parameters.description: The ID of the bucket to list files from.

parameters.name: prefix
parameters.description: Only return files whose names start with this prefix. Useful for browsing 'folders' (e.g., 'photos/').

parameters.name: delimiter
parameters.description: Character used to group files into virtual folders. Typically '/'.

parameters.name: startFileName
parameters.description: The name of the first file to return, for pagination. Use the value of nextFileName from the previous response.

parameters.name: maxFileCount
parameters.description: Maximum number of files to return (1-10000). Default is 100.
